---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope
Which part of the codebase would this affect?
- [ ] Backend — payment engine
- [ ] Backend — API routes
- [ ] Frontend — dashboard UI
- [ ] Frontend — voucher claim flow
- [ ] Soroban contract
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Additional context
Mockups, diagrams, or links to relevant prior art.
